D:\stm32environment\arm\bin\arm-none-eabi-gcc.exe -g -Wl,-gc-sections,--print-memory-usage,-Map=D:/car_3/car_project1/cmake-build-debug/car_project1.map -mcpu=cortex-m3 -mthumb -mthumb-interwork -T
